{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Phoenix
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Phoenix]] found a dead world.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Phoenix]] is a member of the [[Court of Seven]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
